title: SQL Table Join for E-commerce Data
scenario: Generate a SQL query to join three tables: customers, orders, and products. The query should retrieve the customer ID, order ID, and product name for all orders placed by customers who have purchased products with a price greater than $100.
constraints: Must use the JOIN clause to combine the tables
Must use the ON operator to specify the join conditions
Must use the WHERE clause to filter the results

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the generated SQL query retrieves the correct rows based on the specified conditions.
Check if the generated SQL syntax is valid and follows the standard SQL syntax rules.
Evaluate how accurate the generated SQL query is when handling different join types and conditions.
